data.current_description: Check if an API token is valid.
data.description_suggestion: Validates the provided API key for authentication. Returns validation status and key details if valid. Used to verify API credentials before making authenticated requests. No side effects on validation.

message: Operation 'makeAllocation' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, missing_input_details, missing_output_details. Original summary 'Make an allocation' is too generic. data.current_description: Allocate trees, plastic bottles, or carbon offset to a profile. Limits: 100 trees/bottles per request, 5t carbon per request.
data.summary_suggestion: Allocate climate impact resources to profile
data.description_suggestion: Allocates climate impact resources (trees, plastic bottles, or carbon offset) to a profile. Accepts AllocationRequest with resource type and quantity. Limits: 100 trees/bottles per request, 5 tonnes carbon per request. Returns updated Allocation object reflecting the new resource totals. Requires authentication and valid profileId.
data.reasoning: Original summary 'Make an allocation' is too generic. Description lacks input/output details and authentication requirements. Enhanced version specifies the request schema, response object, authentication requirement, and parameter validation needed. This helps AI agents understand exactly what to send and what to expect back.
